__comment_intro__: Editable JSON model structure for Conway's Game of Life. Demonstrates how to define non-physical, purely discrete cellular automata using the .simmodel architecture.

grid.__comment__: The grid wraps around (periodic), creating a toroidal surface for the Game of Life to prevent edge-termination issues.

numerics.__comment__: Discrete steps. No gradients or continuous physics solvers needed.

domains.__comment__: Domains define valid states. Here we ensure 'living' only holds 0 or 1.

variables.description: Step counter representing discrete generation ticks.
Discrete step increment (always 1 for standard GOL).
Binary state: 1 if the cell is alive, 0 if dead.
Optional boundary-only seed value for edge-conditioned initialization workflows.

stages.description: Advances the global generation step counter.
Evaluates Conway's rules on neighboring cells to determine next generation life state.
Ensures no floating point or numeric drift alters the states from strictly 0 or 1.
